name: Miriam and Alan: Lost in Scotland
original_name: Miriam and Alan: Lost in Scotland
overview: Miriam Margolyes and Alan Cumming roll back the decades and return to their Scottish roots. Part rediscovery, part revelation, we follow them as they take to the road and motorhome their way through Scotland's Highlands and into its wildest places.

trailers.title: Miriam Margolyes Being Absolutely Iconic | Miriam and Alan: Lost in Scotland and Beyond | Channel 4
